title: cirsium × rigens
intro: Cirsium × rigens, also known as the thistle milkwort or thistle hawkweed, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is a cross between the Canada thistle and the Nodding Thistle. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Cirsium × rigens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural remedy for wounds and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in salves and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
